response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong backend and distributed systems expertise, with notable experience in event-driven architectures, microservices, and real-time systems (e.g., Dunnhumby, re:cinq). His work on AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) aligns with the role's technical requirements. However, his lack of direct fintech experience, multi-agent AI production deployment, or leadership scaling to 30+ engineers significantly weakens his fit. His recent executive role (Staff Software Engineer) is promising but not equivalent to a CTO-level position.
strengths: Deep backend and distributed-systems expertise (event streaming, microservices, real-time systems)
Experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, agentic workflows)
Strong open-source contributions and event-driven platform development (GISCollective)
concerns: No demonstrated production experience with multi-agent AI systems in commercial contexts
Limited fintech or credit-risk systems experience (key requirement)
No track record scaling engineering teams to 30+ people or leading external delivery partners
